# Tasks: speckit-workflow-resilience
<!-- Generated by /speckit.tasks -->
<!-- Date: 2026-07-16 -->

Feature **A** of three. B = #29, C = #30. Six issues filed from this feature's review: #27‚Äì#32.

**Phase 3 is one task on purpose.** Sketches 1+2+3+4+6 land as a single commit. Four review rounds
produced three ordering defects (1‚Üí3 silent gate pass, 3‚Üí4 `ReferenceError: ledger is not defined`,
stamp‚Üí`keyOf` TDZ), each proving these edits are one change wearing five hats. Splitting them ships a
file that is green on the happy path and throws ‚Äî or lies ‚Äî on the failure paths they exist to fix.

## Phase 1: Setup

- [x] T001 [US6] Create the `node --test` harness skeleton: `makeRun(src)` reading `workflows/speckit-workflow.js`, rewriting `export const meta` ‚Üí `const meta`, wrapping with `'use strict'` first in the body. Assert the rewrite changed the source. **One `makeRun` for the real load AND the strict fixture** ‚Äî two wrappers means the mutation has two sites and SC-007 tests a copy `tests/workflow.test.js`
- [x] T002 [P] [US6] Add the stub kit: a yielding `agent` stub (`await` before returning ‚Äî an un-awaited `return canned()` makes `finally` fire before the promise settles and every reading is 1), per-label invocation counters, a `spawned` label recorder, and both `parallel` contracts (throw‚Üínull and propagating) `tests/workflow.test.js`
- [x] T003 [P] [US6] Add fixtures per `plan.md` ¬ßTest Fixture Design: 2-phase graph with a `done:true` task; duplicate-`T001`-across-phases **that halts before the second's phase**; throws-on-every-attempt; `throw null` (sequential); dead gate; dead `update-tasks-md` `tests/workflow.test.js`

## Phase 2: Foundational ‚Äî RED

- [x] T004 [US1] [US2] [US4] [US7] Write the failing tests for SC-001..SC-005, SC-012, SC-013, SC-015..SC-017 against the **unmodified** file. Spike 2 proved SC-002 goes red (`rejected:[], total:1`); Spike 5 proved SC-004 (`{"completed":2,"total":2}`, both gates dead); the adversary proved SC-012 (`{"completed":3,"total":3}`, tasks.md never written). **Every one must be RED before any fix exists** ‚Äî a test that is green here is testing nothing `tests/workflow.test.js`
- [x] T005 [US6] Prove the harness itself can fail: SC-007's strict fixture (an undeclared assignment must throw), SC-006's rewrite assertion, SC-008's label multiset. Delete `'use strict'` from `makeRun` and confirm the strict fixture goes green ‚Äî then restore it `tests/workflow.test.js`

## Phase 3: User Stories

### P1 ‚Äî Must Have

- [x] T006 [FR-001..FR-007] [FR-012] [FR-013] Land Sketches 1+2+3+4+6 as ONE change, in the order fixed by `plan.md` ¬ßDeclaration order: hoisted `function keyOf`; `agentTyped` (retry throw / never retry null / `e?.message ?? String(e)` / `opts?.label`); `_key` stamp **after the `:240` guard, not after `:238`**; `ledger` reading the stamp rather than recomputing it; index-mapped batch fallback replacing `.filter(Boolean)`; `if (!gate || !gate.passed)` keeping `failures`; `ticked === null` halting the Report phase. T004's tests turn green `workflows/speckit-workflow.js`

## Phase 4: Polish

- [x] T007 [FR-011] [SC-014] Add smoke guards 1, 2, 5, 6, 7 ‚Äî guard 2 satisfies **SC-014** by counting **occurrences** (`grep -o | wc -l`, never `grep -c`), guard 7 anchored to `^[[:space:]]*if` on **both** halves. Guards 3/4 are absent by design (they belong to B/#29); keep the numbering gap `tests/smoke.sh`
- [x] T008 [SC-010] [SC-014] Mutation-test every guard: reintroduce each bug and confirm RED. Specifically: two unwrapped spawns on one line (**SC-014**'s mutation ‚Äî guard 2 must catch what `grep -c` misses); comment out the null-gate fix (guard 7's floor must fire); revert the gate check (guard 7's ceiling must fire) `tests/smoke.sh`
- [x] T009 [SC-010] Mutation-test every behaviour test: run the exact mutation named in each SC row and confirm RED. **SC-002's is the pair** (restore `.filter(Boolean)` AND remove the try/catch) ‚Äî the filter alone is a proven no-op `tests/workflow.test.js`
- [x] T010 [P] [FR-010] [SC-011] Add `node --test` to CI. No `setup-node` ‚Äî `ubuntu-latest` ships node. **Corrected during implementation**: this task, `plan.md`, and the Affected Files table all said `node --test tests/`, which fails on node 26 with `Cannot find module .../tests` ‚Äî passing the directory makes node load it as a module. Bare `node --test` discovers `*.test.js` from the root. Four review rounds by three agents missed it; running it once found it in under a second `.github/workflows/smoke.yml`
- [x] T011 [P] [SC-009] Confirm the existing 38 smoke checks still pass `tests/smoke.sh`
- [x] T012 Version bump to 5.1.0 ‚Äî **all six declarations**: `plugin.json`, `marketplace.json` (`metadata.version` AND `plugins[0].version`), `README.md` footer AND title (`v5.1`), `.claude/CLAUDE.md` title (`v5.1`), `CHANGELOG.md` entry `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- [x] T013 CHANGELOG 5.1.0 entry: the measured evidence (`1/1` silent drop, `2/2` dead gates, `3/3` unwritten tasks.md), the declared success-path shape change (`accepted`/`rejected`/`notAttempted` added), and pointers to #27‚Äì#32 `CHANGELOG.md`

---
**Legend**: `[P]` = parallelizable | `[US#]` = user scenario | `[FR-NNN]` = functional requirement

## Not in this feature

- **#29 (B)** ‚Äî suite dedup, `maxConcurrency` + semaphore + arg validation, throttle. The semaphore's
  *algorithm* survived adversarial attack; only its input validation failed (`0`/`-1` hang, `"abc"` deletes
  the cap at measured peak 20/20). Fix validation; do not redesign correct code.
- **#30 (C)** ‚Äî multi-repo, with four open design questions.
- **#27** ‚Äî `speckit-helper` `NO_SPEC` at exit 0. **#28** ‚Äî `:269` quorum. **#31** ‚Äî `testCommand: ""`
  conflates no-tests with detection-failed. **#32** ‚Äî `redConfirmed`/`greenConfirmed` never read.
- **Deliberately excluded**: renaming the `regression` lens (no requirement needs it; agent labels are
  resume cache keys). A `tries` bound for `NaN` (no call site passes `tries`).
